title: Warm Jammy French Semolina Eclair
description: A crowd-pleasing Basque‑French dessert featuring dense semolina eclairs filled with warm apricot jam, served freshly baked and dusted with powdered sugar.
instructions: In a large saucepan combine semolina, flour, sugar and lemon juice, then add boiling plant milk and oil, whisk until smooth.
Cook mixture over low heat, stirring constantly until thick and glossy, about 5 minutes.
Remove from heat and stir in vanilla extract.
Transfer batter to a piping bag fitted with a round tip.
Pipe 4‑inch long tubes onto parchment‑lined baking sheet.
Bake for 20 minutes until golden and puffed.
While eclairs cool warm jam in a bain‑marie until runny.
Fill cooled eclairs with jam by inserting the tip of the piping bag into the base and pushing jam inside.
Dust eclairs with powdered sugar and serve warm.
